title: Private credit lenders say their big software bet faces an AI reckoning — but not a ‘SaaSpocalypse'
summary_full: Private credit's exposure to software is being tested by AI, as lenders look past “SaaSpocalypse” fears to identify winners and losers.
summary_public: Private credit's exposure to software is being tested by AI, as lenders look past “SaaSpocalypse” fears to identify winners and losers.
